mapper.sql: lc.cef_id, lc.claim_no, lc.lca_value_se_cd, lc.core_lca_val, lc.iluc_emsn, lc.ttl_lca_val, lc.sus_evid_file_id, lc.use_bgng_dt, lc.use_end_dt, lc.frst_reg_dt, lc.frst_reg_user_id, lc.last_chg_dt, lc.last_chg_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_cef_lcyc (cef_id, claim_no, lca_value_se_cd, core_lca_val, iluc_emsn, ttl_lca_val, sus_evid_file_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{cefId}, #{claimNo}, #{lcaValueSeCd}, #{coreLcaVal}, #{ilucEmsn}, #{ttlLcaVal}, #{susEvidFileId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_cef_lcyc SET lca_value_se_cd = #{lcaValueSeCd}, core_lca_val = #{coreLcaVal}, iluc_emsn = #{ilucEmsn}, ttl_lca_val = #{ttlLcaVal}, sus_evid_file_id = #{susEvidFileId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND claim_no = #{claimNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
